title: limonium solandri
intro: Limonium solandri, also known as Soland's sea lavender, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Limonium solandri include its ability to soothe and calm skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Limonium solandri are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments that can be applied topically to the skin or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
